ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical product */,
  "trade_name" TEXT /* Trade name of the chemical product */,
  "type_utilisation" TEXT /* Type or utilization of the chemical product */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical substance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Approval status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical product being approved */,
  "date_of_approval" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved */,
  "approval_type" TEXT /* Type of approval */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the approval */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the product */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msds" (
  "msds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSDS */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical product the MSDS belongs to */,
  "date_of_msds" TEXT /* Date when the MSDS was issued */,
  "msds_revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the MSDS */,
  "msds_file" TEXT /* MSDS document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the MSDS */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the MSDS was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msds_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msds_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical product the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or note */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "commentedBy" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commentedBy FOREIGN KEY ("commentedBy") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical product the restriction belongs to */,
  "restriction_text" TEXT /* Text of the restriction */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of restriction */,
  "restriction_comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES chemical_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
